sec.restartRequired: Restart required for changes to take effect
sec.uacDesc: User Account Control, limits app permissions for system changes
sec.vbsDesc: Virtualization-Based Security, enhances system security with hardware virtualization
sec.memIntegrityDesc: Core isolation, prevents malicious code injection into high-security processes
sec.disableAllDesc: Windows Security Center protects your PC. Running continuously in the background may impact performance

upd.channelConfirm: Switching Windows Update channel requires restart. Continue?
upd.certsDesc: Pull latest root certificates from Windows Update
upd.hidePageDesc: Hide update page and notifications in Settings
upd.driversDesc: Allow Windows Update to automatically install drivers
upd.channelDesc: Switch Windows Insider preview channel (requires Microsoft account registered for Insider)

util.biosDesc: System will enter UEFI firmware settings on reboot, next boot returns to normal
util.hibernateDesc: Save system state to disk and fully power off
util.fastStartupDesc: Combine with hibernate for faster boot
util.photoViewerDesc: Enable classic Windows Photo Viewer to open image files
util.bootSafeNet: Reboot to Safe Mode with Networking
util.safeModeExitNote: To exit Safe Mode, click the "Exit Safe Mode & Reboot" button below

pers.notificationDesc: Control how system notifications are displayed
pers.contextMenuDesc: Toggle between Win11 and classic context menu
pers.explorerHomeDesc: Show or hide Home entry in Explorer
pers.explorerGalleryDesc: Show or hide Gallery entry in Explorer
pers.removeArrowDesc: Remove the small arrow overlay on shortcut icons
pers.removeTextDesc: Don't add "Shortcut" suffix when creating shortcuts
pers.removeShieldDesc: Remove UAC shield overlay on executable icons
pers.win11TaskManagerDesc: Enable or disable Win11 new Task Manager

perf.restartRequired: Restart required for changes to take effect
perf.ultimatePerfDesc: Enable Windows built-in Ultimate Performance power plan
perf.cStateDesc: Disable CPU deep sleep states to reduce latency
perf.superfetchDesc: Pre-load frequently used apps into memory to speed up startup
perf.fullscreenDesc: Lower latency for fullscreen games and apps
perf.windowedDesc: Optimize rendering and input latency for windowed apps
perf.mpoDesc: Multi-Plane Overlay, reduces input latency for windowed games
perf.clearShaderDesc: Clear GPU shader cache to fix stuttering and rendering issues
perf.gameBarDesc: Enable or disable Game Bar service (does not affect Xbox)
